location: Dropped by the Dragonkin Soldier field boss in Lake of Rot, an underground area reached via Ranni's questline — give her the Fingerslayer Blade to open a portal atop Renna's Rise in Liurnia, leading down through Ainsel River to Lake of Rot.
tactics: Progress Ranni's questline far enough to receive the Fingerslayer Blade and give it to her — this opens a teleporter atop Renna's Rise in Liurnia
Follow Ainsel River Main down through Nokstella, Eternal City, then via Nokstella Waterfall Basin into Lake of Rot
The lake is a sea of Scarlet Rot — equip Preserving Boluses, Flame, Cleanse Me, or rot-resistant gear before entering
Step on the weighted pad on the eastern pillar near the boss to raise stone platforms out of the rot, or pull it onto them with ranged attacks
lore: Fashioned from a polished dragon scale said to hold a trace of the ancient dragons' immortality — though the Dragonkin Soldiers who carried blades like it never achieved that immortality themselves, becoming withered echoes of the dragons they tried to emulate.

builds.name: Dex/Quality Katana
builds.why: D Strength / C Dexterity scaling with a fixed Ice Lightning Sword skill that can't be swapped

builds.name: Anti-Dragon pick
builds.why: Carries a 20% damage bonus vs Dragon-type enemies (10% vs Ancient Dragons) — a strong niche pick for Farum Azula
